name: Rubeus
summary: Rubeus is a C toolset for raw Kerberos interaction and abuse. Performs kerberoasting, AS-REP roasting, ticket extraction, ticket forging (golden/silver/unconstrained), S4U abuse, and pass-the-ticket.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases, and licence before use. Operates against the operator's own authorized scope only.
